calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Petition To Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing. Appearance required.
The following issues to be cleared/addressed:
(1) Petition reports that Robert Edward McKee (predeceased spouse)'s brother, Robert J. McKee, posted deceased Robert Edward in 2025. The petition alleges that Richard A. McKee is the surviving child of Robert J.; however, the petition is silent whether or not a personal rep has been appointed by a court for Robert J. McKee. See Local Rule 14.18.D.3).
(2) Also, if the petition seeks the court's determination of Richard McKee's entitlement, these allegations must be provided, and his 13100 affidavit must be on file. Otherwise, the Court may wish to determine that 1/6 be distributed to the estate of Richard A. McKee, without making any specific findings.
(3) Petition does not provide the date of death of James McKee (father of Kambi Ownbey) who allegedly predeceased Robert Edward McKee.

PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
EXAMINER: AEYOUNG KIM

Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Isabella Monahan appeared via zoom for John Mokricky (petitioner).
Brooke Birgham appeared via zoom for and with George Nikas (beneficiary).

Ms. Brigham stated that Robert J Mckee passed away, that they found his son Richard, that they are in the process of contacting him for verification of relationship, and that it could possibly lead to other heirs.

The matter is continued to May 18, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition To Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Isabella Monahan appeared via zoom for John Mokricky (petitioner).
Brooke Birgham appeared via zoom for and with George Nikas (beneficiary).

From the outset of the hearing the Court requested some additional information on Mr. Robert J McKee, that if anyone knew about his whereabouts or if he is still alive.

Ms. Monahan stated that they could not locate him and that they used Heir Finder and was unsuccessful.

The court suggested talking to other beneficiaries to see if they have any information on Mr. McKee.

The matter is continued to March 25, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jack Klosek appeared via zoom for John Mokricky (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. John Mokricky is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $457,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.
